# Structured Version

## Clothing text (shirt/printed)

- **Rtheo** (appears as **Rtheo** / possibly **Rthee**; exact letters unclear in places)
- Small additional printed graphics/text on the other shirt: **[unclear]**

# Notes

- The screenshot mainly contains printed text on the subjects’ shirts. Some instances are partially obscured/blurred, so **“Rthee” vs “Rtheo”** may be inconsistent due to readability.
- Other small designs on the shirts are **[unclear]** because the resolution/angle makes the letters difficult to confirm.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
